email.label: MSpa Account E-Mail
email.help: The e-mail address of your MSpa app account

password.label: Password
password.help: Password of your MSpa app account

region.label: Region / Server
region.help: Select the MSpa cloud server for your region

pollInterval.label: Poll Interval (Seconds)
pollInterval.help: How often the device status is polled (minimum 10s)

restoreStateOnPowerCycle.label: Restore state after power cycle
restoreStateOnPowerCycle.help: Automatically restore heating, filter and other settings after restarting the whirlpool

alwaysEnforceUnit.label: Always enforce temperature unit (°C)
alwaysEnforceUnit.help: Correct temperature unit to Celsius at every poll (useful for devices that forget the setting)

pv_enabled.label: Enable PV surplus control
pv_enabled.help: Activate heating / filter automatically when PV surplus is available

pv_power_generated_id.label: Object ID PV generation power (W)
pv_power_generated_id.help: Datapoint containing current PV generation in Watts

pv_power_house_id.label: Object ID house consumption (W)
pv_power_house_id.help: Datapoint containing current house consumption in Watts

pv_threshold_w.label: PV surplus threshold (W)
pv_threshold_w.help: Minimum surplus (PV generation minus house consumption) to activate the whirlpool

pv_hysteresis_w.label: Hysteresis (W)
pv_hysteresis_w.help: Surplus must drop below threshold minus hysteresis before the whirlpool is switched off again
pv_hysteresis_w.validatorErrorText: Hysteresis must be less than the surplus threshold

pv_action_heating.label: Enable heating on surplus
pv_action_heating.help: Switch on the heater when PV surplus is sufficient

pv_target_temp.label: Target temperature during surplus (°C)
pv_target_temp.help: Target temperature to set when PV surplus heating is active

pv_action_filter.label: Enable filter pump on surplus
pv_action_filter.help: Switch on the filter pump when PV surplus is sufficient

pv_action_uvc.label: Enable UVC with filter pump
pv_action_uvc.help: Switch on the UVC lamp together with the filter pump when PV surplus is sufficient (only if your model has a UVC lamp)
